item.name: Gordian Hand Gear Coffer (IL 210)
item.description:
A thick chest containing a piece of Gordian attire.

Required level: 60. IL: 210. Hand gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Alexander - The Cuff of the Father (Savage)
Alexander - The Arm of the Father (Savage)
